title: Travel Emergencies
description: Language for problems abroad: lost passport, delayed flights, missed connections, medical issues.
summary_pt_br: Frases de emergência em viagem: perdi passaporte, voo atrasou, preciso de embaixada, médico que fale inglês.

scenes.subtitle_en: Language for problems abroad: lost passport, delayed flights, missed connections, medical issues.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Frases de emergência em viagem: perdi passaporte, voo atrasou, preciso de embaixada, médico que fale inglês.

scenes.text_en: Language for problems abroad: lost passport, delayed flights, missed connections, medical issues. Today's focus: travel emergencies. I've lost my passport. What should I do?
scenes.text_pt: Frases de emergência em viagem: perdi passaporte, voo atrasou, preciso de embaixada, médico que fale inglês. Foco de hoje: travel emergencies. Perdi o passaporte. O que eu faço?

scenes.title: Travel Emergencies
scenes.body_en: Key phrases: 'I've lost my passport.', 'My flight was delayed.', 'I need to contact the embassy.', 'Is there an English-speaking doctor nearby?'. Present perfect is common for travel crises ('I have lost...').
scenes.body_pt: Frases de emergência em viagem: perdi passaporte, voo atrasou, preciso de embaixada, médico que fale inglês.

examples.en: I've lost my passport. What should I do?
examples.pt: Perdi o passaporte. O que eu faço?

examples.en: My flight has been delayed by four hours.
Could you tell me where the nearest pharmacy is?
examples.pt: Pode me dizer onde é a farmácia mais próxima?

exercise.question: Complete: "I've lost my ___. What should I do?"
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I've lost my passport. What should I do?"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Perdi o passaporte. O que eu faço?

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
My flight has been delayed by four hours.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "My flight has been delayed by four hours."
Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Travel Emergencies — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre travel emergencies. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Airport information, how can I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I've lost my passport somewhere in the terminal.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Did you check the security checkpoint?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I've already checked three times.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You need to contact your country's embassy.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: How do I reach the British embassy from here?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Use the emergency phone near gate twenty.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: My flight has been delayed by six hours.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Are you feeling unwell? Do you need a doctor?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Help is on the way. Stay calm and breathe.

scenes.title: A bad day at the airport
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe Zara's emergency step by step. What went wrong and how did she solve it?
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On a long layover in Frankfurt, Zara discovered that her passport was missing from her bag.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: I've lost my passport somewhere between security and gate twenty-two.

paragraphs.speaker: Agent
paragraphs.en: Don't panic. We'll page security and contact the British consulate immediately.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: My connecting flight has been delayed by four hours already.

paragraphs.speaker: Agent
paragraphs.en: That actually works in your favor. There's time to replace the document today.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Four hours, three phone calls, and one emergency passport later, the journey continued.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Travel Emergencies". Language for problems abroad: lost passport, delayed flights, missed connections, medical issues. I've lost my passport. What should I do? My flight has been delayed by four hours. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Travel Emergencies". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
